summary: Project remains RED. Wave 2 is 6 apps behind. App #17 mainframe discovery has caused schedule compression. Emergency resourcing request approved. Scope reduction options presented to CTO.
accomplishments: Architecture options document for App #17 delivered to client
2 additional engineers approved from global bench — starting May 6
Wave 2 apps 11–14 completed and promoted to staging
next_steps: Complete Wave 2 remaining 6 apps by May 20 with additional engineers
Client decision on App #17 scope by May 9
Present revised delivery plan to CTO by May 12
escalations: REQUEST ESCALATION: December go-live at risk — CTO awareness required; scope reduction or timeline extension decision needed by May 12
